About Us

Montero Maintenance

Excellence in property maintenance, year-round

At Montero Maintenance LLC we are dedicated to keeping your property looking its best year-round. Our comprehensive services include professional power washing to restore the beauty of your exterior surfaces, thorough cleaning for both residential and commercial spaces, expert lawn care to ensure your yard stays healthy and vibrant, and reliable snow removal to keep your property safe and accessible during the winter months.

With a commitment to excellence, attention to detail, and customer satisfaction, our experienced team is here to handle all your outdoor maintenance needs, so you can enjoy a clean, attractive, and well-maintained property in every season.

"Your trusted partner for year-round property maintenance"

- Montero Maintenance Team
